Three platforms. Same week. Same move: inserting an AI layer between your product and your buyer.

The Friday Note — Issue #7

The New Middlemen

March 27, 2026 • The Future of PMM

📱 View the full issue online →

This week I've been thinking about middlemen.

Not the old kind — the distributors, the resellers, the channel partners. The new kind. The ones that showed up this week all at once, without asking.

Google AI Mode crossed 75 million daily active users. Meta embedded Manus into Ads Manager for 4M+ advertisers. OpenAI rolled ChatGPT ads to every free user. And OpenAI + Amazon announced a $50B partnership that Forrester says may have just won consumer agentic commerce.

Three platforms. Same week. Same move: inserting an AI layer between your product and your buyer.

—Chris

🔥 DEEP DIVE

The Full-Stack Buyer: From ERP to AI Checkout

For 20 years, marketing owned awareness, sales owned the deal, and the ERP handled fulfillment. That separation is collapsing.

🏗️ THE NEW COMMERCE STACK:

→ AI Discovery — ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, Perplexity
→ Agentic Checkout — "Buy it in ChatGPT," Google AI Mode Shopping
→ Commerce Cloud — Shopify, Salesforce, SAP Commerce
→ ERP Backend — SAP, Oracle Fusion, Microsoft Dynamics

From the top: Shopify + Google's UCP lets agents browse, cart, and checkout. Walmart, Target, Wayfair on board.

From the bottom: SAP's MCP servers let agents query inventory and pricing from the ERP.

The bridge: OpenAI + Amazon's $50B deal creates persistent-memory agents across the full stack.

Read the Full Analysis →

📊 CHART OF THE WEEK

The Agentic Commerce Explosion

Consumers Using AI in Their Buying Journey:

2023: ~8%
2024: ~15%
Jan 2026: 45%
2030 (est.): ~50% via agents

Sources: IBM, Morgan Stanley, PYMNTS

McKinsey estimates agentic commerce could redirect $3–5 trillion in global retail spend by 2030. Traffic from AI sources to retail sites has surged 1,200%.

📰 NEWS ROUNDUP

What Happened This Week

OpenAI

ChatGPT ads expand to all free and Go users — Truist: <$1B this year → $30B by 2030.

Meta

Manus AI live in Ads Manager for 4M+ advertisers — 7-week integration, fastest ever.

Shopify + Google

Universal Commerce Protocol gains momentum — Walmart, Target, Wayfair, Etsy on board.

Gartner

AI skills mandatory for marketers by 2027 — $58B productivity shift predicted.

Zalando

Stock surges 12% on AI content economics — AI images = 70% more content at same cost.

Alibaba

Wukong enterprise AI platform launches — Agent paradigm goes global.
